prose: The frontier orbital analysis on oxygen was performed using DFT with the B3LYP functional and the def2-TZVP basis set (tier `standard`) in the gas phase, with a multiplicity of 3. The calculation converged without issues. Results: - HOMO energy: -8.87396 eV; - LUMO energy: -3.58590 eV; - HOMO-LUMO gap: 5.28806 eV. Method used: DFT (B3LYP/def2-TZVP, tier `standard`) in PySCF, in the gas phase.
